reviews.review_description: I love the idea behind this app but it is pixelated/fuzzy and you are a giant. So for someone who has server anxiety this is super bad. My anxiety kicked up abit, I  felt like I was going to fall over and it made me sick to my stomach. Now if they fix the pixels/fuzzy and make it to where your not a giant then this would be a great app to walk with. But for now not for me.
